title: xMelonekMaX's Faithful 64x
description: Continuation of HiTeeN's Faithful 64x resource pack
body:
The last continuing resource pack faithfully following the style of [the first Faithful 64x pack](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/resource-packs/1242446-faithful-64x64).

For many years I carefully selected and modified textures from various packs. Recently, it turned out that I have the last resource pack for the current version of Minecraft, which looks like [the original Faithful 64x by HiTeeN](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/resource-packs/1242446-faithful-64x64). I decided to share it.

## Credits
Many of the textures in this pack are not mine. Some have been copied from other resource packs, some are reworked, some are handmade, and some can no longer be found online.

List of resource packs used:
- [Faithful 64x64 pack by HiTeeN](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/resource-packs/1242446-faithful-64x64) (based on it)
- [Minecraft HD (64x) Fan Updated by mrdhobbs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minecraft-hd(64x)-fan-updated-by-mrdhobbs) (many textures used)
- [Classic Faithful](https://github.com/ClassicFaithful) (many textures rescaled from 32x version)
- [Faithful](https://github.com/Faithful-Resource-Pack) (some textures used)
- [Steven's Traditional](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stevens-traditional) (several files used)

## Contact
If you have any questions, write to me on Discord: xMelonekMaX
